name: teamwork-skill
description: Codex-first skills (also installable on Cursor and Claude Code) for evidence-first planning, role-subagent fan-out, review, and native goal convergence.

interface.shortDescription: Deep Codex collaboration with goals, proactive custom agents, plans, and fresh review.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-first broad entrypoint plus dedicated stage skills for project instruction initialization, evidence gathering, native Teamwork index/current memory, goal proposal, durable artifact memory, scoped execution, native fast-path handling for lightweight work, role-subagent fan-out for valuable independent evidence/design/worker/review tracks, fresh review, package updates, and autonomous goal convergence on top of Codex native capabilities. The same protocol installs on Cursor and Claude Code as supported adapters via ./install.sh cursor or ./install.sh claude.
defaultPrompt: Design a Codex native goal with evidence, scope, retry policy, artifacts, and subagent routing.
Initialize or slim project AGENTS/CODEX/CLAUDE rules with performance-first or cost-first Codex mode while preserving local evidence boundaries.
Fan out valuable independent Codex work into evidence-gathering, planning, execution, and review tracks.
Use role-optimized Teamwork custom agents proactively, including deep xhigh Judge/Reviewer for high-risk review.
Map completion claims and Memory Delta status to direct evidence before accepting the result.
Update Teamwork version metadata and validate the installed skill surface.
